description: Security patterns that must be blocked or mitigated

patterns.name: Reflected_XSS
patterns.description: User input reflected in output without sanitization
patterns.mitigation: sanitizeForOutput() required on all user-provided values

patterns.name: SSRF
patterns.description: Server-side request forgery via untrusted URLs
patterns.mitigation: parseSafeIdentifier() required - only allow known repo patterns

patterns.name: Command_Injection
patterns.description: Shell command injection via untrusted input
patterns.mitigation: Always quote variables, use arrays for commands, validate input format

patterns.name: DoS_Loop
patterns.description: Unbounded loops that could exhaust resources
patterns.mitigation: MAX_RESULTS limits on all list/search operations

patterns.name: Secret_Exposure
patterns.description: Secrets leaked in logs, commits, or state files
patterns.mitigation: Never log tokens, mask in output, scan before commit

patterns.name: State_Tampering
patterns.mitigation: Session lock required, audit trail mandatory
